h1: Custom Badge Reels for Your Team or Event
metaDescription: Order custom badge reels in bulk for your team or event. Durable, retractable designs with full-color printing. Fast turnaround, low MOQs.
introHtml:
Custom badge reels are a staple for any organization that requires ID badges, access cards, or event credentials. Made from durable materials like reinforced nylon and high-impact plastic, these reels withstand daily wear and tear while keeping badges secure and accessible. Options include retractable cords, clip-on attachments, and specialized holders like the Clip-On Secure-A-Badge™ or Trans Retractable Badge Reel.

Perfect for trade shows, corporate offices, hospitals, and schools, badge reels can be decorated with your logo using screen printing, pad printing, or full-color sublimation. Choose from standard shapes or unique designs like Heart Badge Reel- Chroma or Jumbo Oval Badge Reel- Chroma to stand out. With low minimum order quantities and fast production lead times, you can outfit your entire team or event staff without delay.

Whether you need retractable reels for daily use or nylon neck wallets for heavy-duty credentials, we have the right solution. Add a lanyard or badge holder to complete the set. Contact us for pricing and sample availability.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom badge reels?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by style but typically start at 50-100 units. Some items like the Ribbon Badge Reel- Chroma may have lower MOQs. Contact us for specific product requirements.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for badge reels?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing, pad printing, and full-color sublimation. Screen printing works well for simple logos, while sublimation allows vibrant, all-over designs on compatible reels like the Jumbo Oval Badge Reel- Chroma.

faqs.q: How long does production take for custom badge reels?
faqs.a: Standard production lead time is 10-15 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders may be available for an additional fee. Sample approval can speed up the process.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer sample requests for many badge reel styles. You can order a single sample with your logo to check quality and fit before committing to a larger quantity.

faqs.q: What are the different attachment options for badge reels?
faqs.a: Common attachments include retractable cords, alligator clips, and lanyard loops. The Clip-On Secure-A-Badge™ uses a secure clip, while nylon neck wallets offer an alternative for larger credentials.

heroAltText: Custom badge reels with retractable cords and full-color printed logos displayed on a white background.
